name: Leading V2 Backend
description: Submit tasks and poll their status across leading-v2.0 backend modules (失效链接检测, 行业/舆情报告, 舆情监测, AI 文书) by calling the PHP HTTP API as the chat user via Authorization: Bearer <per-uid apiKey>. Tools are scoped to rabbitmq-<userId> agents; per-uid keys are resolved (and auto-provisioned) from the api_key table.

backend.description: leading-v2.0 PHP backend the agent calls on behalf of the user.

siteId.description: Default site/business line id sent as siteId (e.g. legal, sz).

apiKeys.description: Optional explicit per-userId raw API keys; overrides the api_key lookup.

db.description: Write-capable MySQL (superworker) for per-uid api_key lookup/auto-provision.

notify.description: Proactive completion notifications: poll submitted async tasks and report results when done.

ttlMs.description: Give up notifying after this long (default 2h).

mercure.description: Mercure hub for proactive web-chat delivery (same hub the frontend subscribes to). Falls back to MERCURE_HUB_URL / MERCURE_JWT_SECRET env.

smtp.description: Direct SMTP (SSL/465 or STARTTLS/587) for offline notification email to report subscribers. Falls back to SMTP_* env. Recipient resolved from feed_report_subscriber.
